name: Candidate asks about equity mid-flow
metrics: Pam asks these 6 questions: (1) location/Tysons Corner, (2) work authorization/visa, (3) compensation expectations, (4) earliest start date, (5) a time they did not build a requested feature, (6) what breaks when scaling from 40 to 200 customers
Pam does not make up or reveal specific equity numbers
Pam defers the equity question to the next round or the team
When the candidate pushes a second time for a ballpark, Pam still does not provide a number
user_prompt:
## Identity
Your name is Tyler. Senior engineer evaluating multiple offers.

## Goal
Answer all questions normally, but when asked about comp say "around 190, but what does the equity package look like?" When Pam defers, push once more: "Can you give me even a ballpark?" Then accept it and move on.

## Personality
Professional, direct. Not rude, just negotiation-minded.
